description: This file contains unit tests for the Modal component in a Bootstrap-like JavaScript library. It tests various functionalities such as showing, hiding, toggling modals, event handling, and integration with jQuery. The tests verify correct behavior, event firing, DOM manipulation, and configuration options.

classes.name: Modal
classes.description: The Modal class represents the modal dialog component, providing methods to show, hide, toggle, dispose, and handle updates, along with event management and configuration options.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the modal dialog, handling backdrop, focus, and transition effects.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the modal dialog, removing backdrop and restoring focus.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the visibility of the modal.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Disposes of the modal instance, removing event listeners and DOM references.

methods.name: handleUpdate
methods.description: Handles updates to the modal, such as adjusting dialog position.
